properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a pressure building underneath our wings Preparing of people to fly home And I feel this difference in the air Yet His Spirit whispers to my soul That with patience I must still press to the goal Be steady, it will strengthen me to know

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've got to be in condition to go home So I surrender to the fire that brings me change Holding loose all that I possess In this season, I find rest

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Soon the last war will drawn on the sands of time We will stack our weapons on the banks of heaven shore But for now we must polish our sword again Advancing onward even as the sun goes down Embrace the heat of battle taking back our ground Till the captain says you've conquered, Trade your armor for a crown

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will take your hand across the table there We'll cry tears of joy, for the harvest our labors reap And the pain and heartache, we carried on the earth alone They seem a friend now as we kneel before the throne They served a purpose to ready me for home I rejoice in the testing for I will overcome
